moves.name: Venom Flicker
moves.description: Poison Lily snaps her wrist outward in a sharp lateral whip, releasing a needle from her gold wrist chain that she flicks with her index finger at close range. The motion is a tight, precise two-inch snap of the wrist rather than a full arm swing, targeting exposed skin with pinpoint accuracy.
moves.image_snapshot: Standing upright with weight on the left foot, right arm extended fully to the side at shoulder height, wrist bent sharply downward, index finger pointed forward with a needle pinched between fingertip and thumb, left arm pulled tight across the chest, head turned to face the right arm's direction. Speed lines on the right wrist and fingertips.

moves.name: Toxic Cartwheel
moves.description: She drops her left hand to the ground and launches into a one-handed cartwheel, keeping her right arm rigid and fully extended so the needle earring on her right ear traces a wide arc at face level as her body rotates through the air. Both legs sweep overhead in sequence during the rotation before she lands back on her feet.
moves.image_snapshot: Inverted mid-cartwheel, left hand planted flat on the ground, body fully vertical with legs split wide apart above — right leg straight up, left leg angled 45 degrees outward, right arm extended horizontally away from the body, green-streaked ponytail hanging straight down, head facing forward. Motion blur on both legs and the right arm.

moves.name: Dilated Heel Drop
moves.description: She leaps straight up, tucks her knees to her chest at the apex, then drives her right heel downward in a vertical axe-kick while her left leg kicks out horizontally for counterbalance, descending at full speed with the heel aimed at the top of the strike zone. The drop is a straight vertical plunge from maximum jump height.
moves.image_snapshot: Airborne at the apex of descent, right leg fully extended straight downward with heel leading, left leg kicked out horizontally to the left at hip height, torso upright and slightly forward-leaning, both arms swept out to the sides at shoulder height for balance, ponytail blown upward, head tilted slightly down. Motion blur on the right leg from knee to heel.
